006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.*;
029
030import freemarker.core.*;
031import freemarker.template.*;
032
033/**
034 * Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the FreeMarker raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the
035 * {@link FreemarkerMixin} mixin, the {@link FreemarkerServlet} servlet, and the
036 * {@link FreemarkerResource} child flavors.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * This is the §2.3.1 <i>flavor-neutral worker</i> for the FreeMarker capability: it is <b>not</b> one
040 * of the three {@code @Rest} flavor classes &mdash; it is a plain bean that implements
041 * {@link RawTemplateDispatcher} and holds the capability state ({@code basePath} /
042 * {@code templateSuffix} / {@code cacheTemplates} / lazy default configuration) plus the raw-serve
043 * and configuration-resolution logic. Each flavor independently holds an instance of this worker and
044 * delegates to it, so no flavor is another flavor's worker.
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
047 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FreemarkerMixin}
048 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FreemarkerServlet}
049 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FreemarkerResource}
050 *    <li class='jic'>{@link RawTemplateDispatcher}
051 * </ul>
052 *
053 * @since 10.0.0
054 */
055@SuppressWarnings({
056   "resource" // Closeables here are framework-managed and not owned/closed by this class; not a real leak.
057})
058public class FreemarkerDispatcher implements RawTemplateDispatcher {
059
060   /** Default base path applied when no {@link Builder#basePath(String)} call has been made. */
061   public static final String DEFAULT_BASE_PATH = "/";
062
063   /** Default template suffix &mdash; empty (literal template names, no implicit suffix). */
064   public static final String DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX = "";
065
066   /** Default template-cache flag &mdash; {@code true} (production-safe). */
067   public static final boolean DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES = true;
068
069   private final String basePath;
070   private final String templateSuffix;
071   private final boolean cacheTemplates;
072
073   // Lazy bridge-default configuration. Built on first call to resolveConfiguration(...) when
074   // no Configuration bean is registered in the request's BeanStore. Volatile so the
075   // double-checked-locking idiom is safe under concurrent first-request load.
076   @SuppressWarnings({
077      "java:S3077" // volatile is required here for correct double-checked-locking safe-publication of the lazily-built default Configuration in resolveConfiguration(); the reference is publish-once (fully constructed before assignment) and never compound-mutated.
078   })
079   private volatile Configuration defaultConfiguration;
080
081   /**
082    * Creates a new builder.
083    *
084    * @return A new builder.
085    */
086   public static Builder create() {
087      return new Builder();
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Builder constructor.
092    *
093    * @param builder The builder. Must not be {@code null}.
094    */
095   protected FreemarkerDispatcher(Builder builder) {
096      basePath = builder.basePath;
097      templateSuffix = builder.templateSuffix;
098      cacheTemplates = builder.cacheTemplates;
099   }
100
101   /**
102    * Returns the base path under which template resources are resolved.
103    *
104    * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
105    */
106   public String getBasePath() {
107      return basePath;
108   }
109
110   /**
111    * Returns the configured template-name suffix.
112    *
113    * @return The template suffix. Never {@code null}.
114    */
115   public String getTemplateSuffix() {
116      return templateSuffix;
117   }
118
119   /**
120    * Returns the template-cache flag.
121    *
122    * @return The cache flag.
123    */
124   public boolean isCacheTemplates() {
125      return cacheTemplates;
126   }
127
128   /**
129    * Appends {@link #getTemplateSuffix()} to {@code name} if not already present (idempotent).
130    *
131    * @param name The template name. Must not be {@code null}.
132    * @return The template name with the configured suffix appended (if applicable).
133    */
134   public String applyTemplateSuffix(String name) {
135      if (isEmpty(templateSuffix))
136         return name;
137      if (name.endsWith(templateSuffix))
138         return name;
139      return name + templateSuffix;
140   }
141
142   /**
143    * Resolves the active {@link Configuration}.
144    *
145    * <p>
146    * Lookup order:
147    * <ol class='spaced-list'>
148    *    <li>{@code req.getContext().getBeanStore().getBean(Configuration.class)} &mdash; any
149    *       user-supplied bean (Spring {@code @Bean} including Spring Boot autoconfig, microservice
150    *       {@code BasicBeanStore.put}, etc.).
151    *    <li>Lazy bridge default &mdash; constructed on first call when no configuration bean is
152    *       registered. Anchored on a classpath resource root derived from
153    *       {@link #getBasePath() basePath}, with {@code IncompatibleImprovements} pinned to the
154    *       bridge-tested minor version.
155    * </ol>
156    *
157    * @param req The current REST request.
158    * @return The active FreeMarker configuration. Never {@code null}.
159    */
160   public Configuration resolveConfiguration(RestRequest req) {
161      var bean = req.getContext().getBeanStore().getBean(Configuration.class);
162      if (bean.isPresent())
163         return bean.get();
164      var local = defaultConfiguration;
165      if (local == null) {
166         synchronized (this) {
167            local = defaultConfiguration;
168            if (local == null) {
169               local = buildDefaultConfiguration();
170               defaultConfiguration = local;
171            }
172         }
173      }
174      return local;
175   }
176
177   /**
178    * Constructs the bridge-default {@link Configuration}.
179    *
180    * <p>
181    * Anchored on a classpath resource root derived from {@link #getBasePath() basePath} (leading +
182    * trailing slashes trimmed; a {@code "/"} base yields a root-of-classpath resolver). The default
183    * pins {@code IncompatibleImprovements} to {@link Configuration#VERSION_2_3_34} so behavior is
184    * stable across consumer upgrades of {@code org.freemarker:freemarker}; sets
185    * {@code DefaultEncoding} to {@code UTF-8} and {@code OutputFormat} to
186    * {@link HTMLOutputFormat#INSTANCE} so HTML escaping is the natural target; and applies
187    * {@code TemplateUpdateDelayMilliseconds} per the configured
188    * {@link #isCacheTemplates() cacheTemplates} flag.
189    *
190    * <p>
191    * Subclasses may override to plug in custom loaders / encodings / output formats without
192    * registering a separate {@code @Bean Configuration}.
193    *
194    * @return A new {@link Configuration} instance.
195    */
196   protected Configuration buildDefaultConfiguration() {
197      var cfg = new Configuration(Configuration.VERSION_2_3_34);
198      cfg.setClassLoaderForTemplateLoading(FreemarkerDispatcher.class.getClassLoader(), toResourceRoot(basePath));
199      cfg.setDefaultEncoding("UTF-8");
200      cfg.setOutputFormat(HTMLOutputFormat.INSTANCE);
201      cfg.setTemplateUpdateDelayMilliseconds(cacheTemplates ? Long.MAX_VALUE : 0L);
202      return cfg;
203   }
204
205   /**
206    * Translates a virtual base path (e.g. {@code "/templates/"}) into a FreeMarker
207    * {@code ClassLoaderTemplateLoader} resource root (e.g. {@code "/templates"}).
208    *
209    * <p>
210    * FreeMarker's
211    * {@link Configuration#setClassLoaderForTemplateLoading(ClassLoader, String)
212    * setClassLoaderForTemplateLoading(ClassLoader, String basePackagePath)} expects a
213    * classpath-relative root with a leading {@code "/"}. We trim any trailing slash and ensure a
214    * single leading slash; a {@code null} / blank / {@code "/"} base yields {@code "/"} (root of
215    * classpath).
216    *
217    * @param base The virtual base path.
218    * @return The FreeMarker classloader resource root (never {@code null}; always starts with
219    *    {@code "/"}).
220    */
221   static String toResourceRoot(String base) {
222      if (isBlank(base))
223         return "/";
224      var s = base;
225      while (s.endsWith("/") && s.length() > 1)
226         s = s.substring(0, s.length() - 1);
227      if (! s.startsWith("/"))
228         s = "/" + s;
229      return s;
230   }
231
232   /**
233    * Renders a raw template through the FreeMarker engine onto the response.
234    *
235    * @param path The trailing path segment after the mount prefix (the template name relative to
236    *    the configured {@link #getBasePath() base path}; configured suffix appended if missing).
237    * @param req The current REST request.
238    * @param res The current REST response.
239    * @throws IOException If the underlying response writer fails.
240    * @throws BasicHttpException On boundary violation (403), missing engine (500), or render
241    *    failure (500).
242    */
243   @Override /* RawTemplateDispatcher */
244   public void render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
245         throws IOException, BasicHttpException {
246
247      var template = (path == null) ? "" : path;
248
249      // resolveVirtualPathSafely validates that the resolved virtual path stays inside the
250      // configured basePath. The traversal check operates on basePath + template so a template
251      // name like "../../etc/passwd" or "a/b/../../../secret" is rejected before reaching the
252      // engine. We re-derive the configuration-relative template name from the safe result by
253      // stripping the (already-normalized) basePath prefix.
254      String safeTemplate;
255      try {
256         var resolved = FileUtils.resolveVirtualPathSafely(basePath, template);
257         safeTemplate = stripBasePath(basePath, resolved);
258      } catch (IllegalArgumentException ex) {
259         throw new Forbidden("Path escapes configured base path.");
260      }
261
262      // Apply suffix idempotently so /freemarker/about resolves to about.ftlh (when
263      // templateSuffix is configured), while /freemarker/about.ftlh stays as-is.
264      safeTemplate = applyTemplateSuffix(safeTemplate);
265
266      try {
267         var cfg = resolveConfiguration(req);
268         if (! res.containsHeader("Content-Type"))
269            res.setHeader("Content-Type", FreemarkerViewRenderer.DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE);
270         var tpl = cfg.getTemplate(safeTemplate);
271         tpl.process(Map.of(), res.getWriter());
272         res.getWriter().flush();
273      } catch (LinkageError ex) {
274         throw new InternalServerError(ex, FreemarkerViewRenderer.NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC);
275      } catch (IOException | BasicHttpException ex) {
276         throw ex;
277      } catch (TemplateException | RuntimeException ex) {
278         throw new InternalServerError(ex, "FreeMarker render failed for ''{0}''", safeTemplate);
279      }
280   }
281
282   /**
283    * Strips the normalized {@code basePath} prefix from a {@code resolveVirtualPathSafely}
284    * result so the leftover string is configuration-relative (the bridge's default configuration
285    * re-adds the configured resource-root prefix via its template loader).
286    *
287    * <p>
288    * Normalization mirrors {@code FileUtils.resolveVirtualPathSafely}: a {@code null} / empty
289    * base normalizes to {@code "/"}; otherwise the base is guaranteed to start with {@code "/"}
290    * and end with {@code "/"} once the helper has normalized it.
291    *
292    * @param base The configured base path (typically {@code "/templates/"}).
293    * @param resolved The output of {@code resolveVirtualPathSafely} (always starts with the
294    *    normalized base).
295    * @return The configuration-relative template name (e.g. {@code "hello.ftlh"} for base
296    *    {@code "/templates/"} and resolved {@code "/templates/hello.ftlh"}).
297    */
298   static String stripBasePath(String base, String resolved) {
299      var bp = isEmpty(base) ? "/" : base;
300      if (! bp.endsWith("/"))
301         bp = bp + "/";
302      if (! bp.startsWith("/"))
303         bp = "/" + bp;
304      if (resolved.startsWith(bp))
305         return resolved.substring(bp.length());
306      throw illegalArg("Resolved path ''{0}'' does not start with base ''{1}''", resolved, bp);
307   }
308
309   /**
310    * Builder for {@link FreemarkerDispatcher}.
311    */
312   public static class Builder {
313
314      String basePath = DEFAULT_BASE_PATH;
315      String templateSuffix = DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX;
316      boolean cacheTemplates = DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES;
317
318      /** Constructor &mdash; package access for {@link FreemarkerDispatcher#create()}. */
319      protected Builder() {}
320
321      /**
322       * Sets the classpath base path under which template resources are resolved.
323       *
324       * @param value The base path. {@code null} or blank values reset to the default
325       *    {@link FreemarkerDispatcher#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH}.
326       * @return This object.
327       */
328      public Builder basePath(String value) {
329         basePath = isBlank(value) ? DEFAULT_BASE_PATH : value;
330         return this;
331      }
332
333      /**
334       * Sets the suffix to append to template names that don't already end with it
335       * (idempotent).
336       *
337       * @param value The new suffix. {@code null} resets to
338       *    {@link FreemarkerDispatcher#DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX}.
339       * @return This object.
340       */
341      public Builder templateSuffix(String value) {
342         templateSuffix = (value == null) ? DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX : value;
343         return this;
344      }
345
346      /**
347       * Sets the template-cache flag for the bridge-default configuration.
348       *
349       * @param value The cache flag.
350       * @return This object.
351       */
352      public Builder cacheTemplates(boolean value) {
353         cacheTemplates = value;
354         return this;
355      }
356
357      /**
358       * Reads the current base path setting (test/inspection helper).
359       *
360       * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
361       */
362      public String getBasePath() {
363         return basePath;
364      }
365
366      /**
367       * Reads the current template-suffix setting (test/inspection helper).
368       *
369       * @return The template suffix. Never {@code null}.
370       */
371      public String getTemplateSuffix() {
372         return templateSuffix;
373      }
374
375      /**
376       * Reads the current cache-templates setting (test/inspection helper).
377       *
378       * @return The cache flag.
379       */
380      public boolean isCacheTemplates() {
381         return cacheTemplates;
382      }
383
384      /**
385       * Builds the {@link FreemarkerDispatcher}.
386       *
387       * @return A new {@link FreemarkerDispatcher} instance.
388       */
389      public FreemarkerDispatcher build() {
390         if (basePath == null)
391            throw illegalArg("basePath must not be null");
392         return new FreemarkerDispatcher(this);
393      }
394   }
395}
